info.description: Backend service for trunk-recorder data ingestion and querying. Provides REST APIs for accessing radio system data, calls, talkgroups, and units.
info.title: tr-engine API

get.description: Returns deduplicated call groups (calls from multiple recorders grouped together)
Returns a call group with all its individual call recordings
Returns call recordings with optional filters
Returns currently active calls (calls without a stop_time)
Returns currently active calls from in-memory tracker (real-time from MQTT)
Returns recently completed calls from database with full unit list and audio status
Returns a single call by its trunk-recorder call ID
Streams the audio file for a call
Returns the list of frequency entries (freqList) within a call, ordered by position in the audio
Returns the list of unit transmissions (srcList) within a call, ordered by position in the audio
Returns all known recorder states from in-memory cache (populated by MQTT recorder messages)
Returns overall system statistics including counts and call metrics
Returns summary statistics and recent activity across all systems
Returns system decode rate measurements over time
Returns all registered radio systems
Returns a single system by ID
Returns all talkgroups for a specific system
Returns all talkgroups, optionally filtered by system
Returns counts of encrypted and clear calls per talkgroup from recent activity
Returns a single talkgroup by ID
Returns calls for a specific talkgroup
Returns all radio units, optionally filtered by system
Returns units that have had recent activity within the specified time window
Returns a single unit by ID
Returns calls that include transmissions from a specific unit
Returns events (affiliations, registrations, etc.) for a specific unit

parameters.description: Filter by event type (on, off, join, call, etc.)
parameters.name: type

tgid.description: Joined fields (not stored in calls table)

models.CallFrequency.description: Frequency usage information within a call

models.System.description: A radio system (P25, SmartNet, conventional, etc.)

models.Talkgroup.description: A talkgroup on a radio system

models.Transmission.description: A single unit's transmission within a call

models.Unit.description: A radio unit (mobile or portable radio)

last_event_type.description: Joined fields (not stored in units table)

models.UnitEvent.description: A unit event such as registration, affiliation, or call activity
